Whether you need custom woodwork, structural carpentry, or renovation work, our experienced team is ready to tackle all types of carpentry projects with precision and exceptional craftsmanship. Our Carpentry Services Our wide range of carpentry services for both residential and commercial properties includes: Interior Carpentry From fitting doors and windows to crafting custom architraves, our team enhances the aesthetic appeal and functionality of your home’s interior.

From day one, our team has been dedicated to evolving our services and continually improving how we deliver them, working closely with each client to exceed expectations at every stage. Whether you're upgrading your home, in need of urgent roofing repairs, or seeking custom carpentry solutions, A & F NSW is here to bring your vision to life—with quality you can trust.

Book a Free Consultation Slide title Write your caption here Button Slide title Write your caption here Button Slide title Write your caption here Button Why Choose A & F NSW. Over a Decade of Experience Family Owned & Operated Extensive Range of Carpentry Services Free Consultations Available To get started on your next project, give our team at A & F NSW a call on 0449 832 220. contact info Phone: 0449 832 220 Email: alexander-afpro@outlook.

Learn More Welcome to A & F NSW: Your Trusted Carpentry & Roofing Experts A & F NSW, based in Chipping Norton, has been delivering high-quality residential and commercial carpentry and roofing solutions throughout Sydney and surrounding areas for over a decade. Call Our Team About Us Founded by Alexander Fonseca in 2013, A & F NSW has built a strong reputation for delivering exceptional craftsmanship and dependable construction solutions across Chipping Norton and the greater Sydney region.

Read More Alexander’s career in the trade began in the Blue Mountains, where he worked on large-scale hotel developments and specialised in heritage carpentry. This early experience helped him refine his technical skills and develop a deep appreciation for quality workmanship—an ethos he brings to every project today. As a proud family-owned and operated business, A & F NSW is built on a foundation of integrity, reliability, and a genuine commitment to customer satisfaction.

Whether you require a roof inspection, repairs, or a full roof replacement, we have the expertise to handle it all. Our Reliable Roofing Services We offer a comprehensive range of roofing services to ensure your property remains secure and well-maintained: Gutter and Fascia Installation Gutters and fascias are essential for protecting your home from water damage. We install and maintain high-quality guttering systems to ensure your home stays dry.

Aluminium Pergolas For a sleek, contemporary look, we offer aluminium pergolas that provide a low-maintenance, long-lasting option for your outdoor area. These are perfect for homeowners who want a modern, durable structure. Custom Pergolas Whether you’re looking for a custom design or a pre-fabricated solution, our team offers both options to suit your needs and budget. We work closely with you to create the perfect outdoor structure for relaxing or entertaining.

We offer emergency roofing services across Sydney, including leak and storm damage repairs. Our team responds promptly to secure your property and reduce further damage. Do you need a roofing expert. Reach out to us today on 0449 832 220. contact info Phone: 0449 832 220 Email: alexander-afpro@outlook.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for A&F Carpentry & Construction — a Sydney-based company providing professional carpentry services including custom cabinetry, timber decking, door & window installation, kitchen renovations, bathroom renovations, pergolas, fencing, and general carpentry & maintenance.

Contact: Phone: +61 449 832 220 | Email: alexander-afpro@outlook.com | Website: https://www.afnsw.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 449 832 220
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to A&F Carpentry & Construction! How can we help you today?
